scripts.test:ordered: npm run clean && node scripts/select-company.mjs --project=Inventory && node scripts/select-company.mjs --project=Purchases && node scripts/select-company.mjs --project=Sales
scripts.clean: rm -rf test-results/ allure-results/ recordings/ artifacts/ coverage/
scripts.allure:generate: npx allure generate allure-results --clean -o allure-report && npx ts-node scripts/latency-tracker.ts
scripts.report:allure: npm run allure:generate && npx allure open allure-report
scripts._comment_company: --- Direct bypassing of selector: BEFFA_COMPANY='name' npx playwright test ---
